title: Natural Earth Reference Collection
html:
Natural Earth archives are used as the first clean-room global basemap seed.

Collected slices:

  • Scale: 1:110m.
  • Retrieved: 2026-06-23.
  • Local archives: 110m/*.zip.
  • Machine-readable manifest:

data/core/map-data/world_map_collection_manifest.json.

  • Source registry record:

map_source.natural_earth.110m.v1 in data/core/map-data/world_map_source_registry.json.

  • Scale: 1:10m.
  • Retrieved: 2026-06-23.
  • Local archives: 10m/*.zip.
  • Machine-readable evidence manifest:

data/era-packages/southern-ming/curated/geography/phase1_map_source_evidence_manifest.json.

  • Source registry record:

map_source.natural_earth.10m.v1 in data/core/map-data/world_map_source_registry.json.

Use:

  • Low-resolution 1:110m land, ocean, coastline, lake, river, country, and

populated place reference.

  • Higher-detail 1:10m Phase 1 support for the Lower Yangtze and Huai corridor:

land, ocean, coastline, rivers, lakes, modern admin context, populated places, roads, ports, and urban areas.

  • Frontend world-map framing and future generated projection testing.
  • Modern reference hints only.

Do not use it as historical truth for borders, sovereignty, culture, religion, route quality, or historical settlement status.
